name: Book a boutique hotel in Paris for a business trip
instruction: I need a 3-night stay in Paris from 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-04 for a client meeting. Show me 2 options, ask about budget, then book after I approve.
description: Persona will reveal a budget cap only after being asked. Agent must confirm before booking.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona for a maximum nightly budget before proposing hotels.
Executor presents at least two hotel options with price and location details.
Executor obtains explicit approval before creating any booking event.
world_assertions: If executed: a new calendar_event on cal_work from 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-04 titled containing 'Paris' and 'hotel'.

name: Arrange airport pickup for a morning flight
instruction: My flight departs 2026-05-15 07:30 from SFO. I need a rideshare to the terminal, but I only want to use Lyft. Set it up.
description: Persona insists on Lyft; agent must confirm cost and schedule before ordering.
success_criteria: Executor confirms the rideshare pickup time at least 30 minutes before flight departure.
Executor explicitly asks the persona to approve the Lyft request and cost estimate.
Executor does not place the ride request without the persona's explicit confirmation.
world_assertions: If executed: a new reminder on list_work for 2026-05-15 06:30 with title mentioning 'Lyft to SFO'.

name: Adjust itinerary after a flight delay
instruction: My flight to Chicago got delayed by 3 hours. Rework my schedule: push the 10am client call to later, and let the team know.
description: Persona will reject moving the call before 2pm. Agent must negotiate new time.
success_criteria: Executor proposes a new time for the client call after 14:00.
Executor asks the persona to confirm the revised call time before updating the calendar.
Executor sends a draft message to the team summarizing the delay and new call time.
world_assertions: If executed: the original 10:00 calendar_event on cal_work is moved to a 2026-05-11 slot after 14:00.

name: Gather visa requirements for Japan trip
instruction: Planning a family vacation to Tokyo from 2026-07-10 to 2026-07-20. I need to know what visas my kids need and any paperwork.
description: Persona will only reveal children's ages after being asked; visa depends on age.
success_criteria: Executor asks for the ages of each child before providing visa info.
Executor supplies visa requirements for each age group clearly.
Executor offers to create a reminder to collect required documents before travel.
world_assertions: If executed: a new reminder on list_personal for 2026-06-30 titled containing 'visa documents for Tokyo'.

name: Book flight using preferred airline
instruction: I need a round‑trip flight from NYC to London, departing 2026-09-05 and returning 2026-09-12. I only fly Delta. Show options and book after I pick.
description: Persona will provide a maximum price after seeing options. Agent must respect it.
success_criteria: Executor lists at least two Delta flight options with price and duration.
Executor asks the persona for a maximum acceptable total price before booking.
Executor confirms the chosen flight with the persona before creating any calendar entry.
world_assertions: If executed: a new calendar_event on cal_work for 2026-09-05 to 2026-09-12 titled containing 'Delta' and 'London'.

name: Rebook after airline cancellation
instruction: My airline just cancelled my 2026-08-15 flight to Berlin. Find the next available flight, keep the same arrival time if possible, and update my calendar.
description: Persona will not accept a later arrival after 16:00. Agent must respect that constraint.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona if a later arrival time is acceptable before presenting alternatives.
Executor proposes at least one flight arriving before 16:00 on the same day.
Executor obtains explicit approval before updating the calendar event.
world_assertions: If executed: a calendar_event on cal_work for 2026-08-15 with new departure time and arrival before 16:00.

name: Purchase travel insurance for upcoming trip
instruction: I’m traveling to Canada from 2026-10-01 to 2026-10-07. I’d like coverage for medical emergencies and trip cancellation. Find a plan and get my approval before buying.
description: Persona will mention a maximum premium of $150 after being asked.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona for the maximum insurance premium they are willing to pay.
Executor presents at least one policy under that premium with coverage details.
Executor confirms purchase intent before any transaction is recorded.
world_assertions: If executed: a new transaction on account_00 for a travel insurance premium ≤ $150.

name: Schedule a family video call during overseas trip
instruction: I’ll be in Rome from 2026-06-15 to 2026-06-22. I want a Sunday evening video call with my parents at 19:00 their time. Help set it up.
description: Persona will reveal that parents are in GMT+0. Agent must handle time zone conversion.
success_criteria: Executor asks for the parents' time zone before proposing a call time.
Executor suggests a call slot that aligns with 19:00 GMT and the Rome evening.
Executor creates a calendar event after the persona confirms the time.
world_assertions: If executed: a calendar_event on cal_family for 2026-06-16 20:00 local Rome time titled 'Video call with parents'.

name: Handle overweight luggage fee
instruction: My airline warned that my checked bag will be overweight by 5kg. I want to avoid the fee. Suggest options and act only after I approve.
description: Persona may accept paying if alternative is too costly. Agent must present cost comparison.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona if they prefer paying the fee or redistributing items.
Executor provides cost estimate for the overweight fee and any alternative shipping options.
Executor proceeds only after the persona explicitly chooses an option.
world_assertions: If executed: a new transaction on account_01 for the overweight fee amount, OR a reminder to re‑pack luggage.

name: Reserve a rental car for a business trip
instruction: I’m flying into Austin on 2026-07-20 and need a compact car for 4 days. Show me two options and book after I pick.
description: Persona will mention a preference for pickup at the airport and a max daily budget of $40.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona for the maximum daily rental budget before listing cars.
Executor presents at least two compact car options within that budget, including pickup location.
Executor confirms the selection before creating any reservation.
world_assertions: If executed: a new reminder on list_work for 2026-07-20 10:00 titled containing 'pick up rental car'.

name: Check passport expiration before trip
instruction: I have a conference in Seoul on 2026-11-05. Verify my passport is valid for at least six months and alert me if renewal is needed.
description: Persona will reveal passport expiration date only after being asked for it.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona for the passport expiration date before assessing eligibility.
Executor informs the persona whether the passport meets the six‑month rule.
Executor creates a reminder to renew the passport if it does not meet the requirement.
world_assertions: If executed: a new reminder on list_personal with title containing 'renew passport' and a due date before 2026-05-10.

name: Create a multi‑city itinerary for Europe
instruction: I want to visit Berlin, Prague, and Vienna from 2026-09-01 to 2026-09-10. Help outline travel days, suggest transport, and set up calendar blocks.
description: Persona will mention a desire for low‑stress travel and a max of 2 hours train per leg.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona for the maximum travel time they are comfortable with per leg.
Executor proposes a day‑by‑day itinerary respecting that limit.
Executor obtains approval before adding any calendar events.
world_assertions: If executed: three new calendar_event entries on cal_work for each city stay with dates matching the proposed itinerary.

name: Negotiate compensation for overbooked flight
instruction: My flight to Miami was overbooked and they offered a voucher. I need to get a cash compensation instead. Help me contact the airline and negotiate.
description: Persona will only proceed if the assistant drafts a polite but firm email first.
success_criteria: Executor drafts a negotiation email requesting cash compensation.
Executor asks the persona to review and approve the email before sending.
Executor confirms the email was sent and records the action.
world_assertions: If executed: a new email in outbox addressed to the airline with subject containing 'compensation'.

name: Find flight with preferred stopover city
instruction: Need a flight from Seattle to Dubai on 2026-12-01, but I want a 2‑hour layover in Istanbul. Show options that meet this.
description: Persona will refuse any layover longer than 3 hours. Agent must filter accordingly.
success_criteria: Executor confirms the maximum acceptable layover duration before searching.
Executor lists at least one flight itinerary with a 2‑hour layover in Istanbul.
Executor obtains explicit approval before creating any calendar entry.
world_assertions: If executed: a calendar_event on cal_work for 2026-12-01 with title containing 'Seattle → Dubai' and 'Istanbul layover'.

name: Secure last‑minute hotel in Tokyo
instruction: My flight to Tokyo arrived early on 2026-04-20 and I need a hotel for that night only. Find a room under $120 and book after I confirm.
description: Persona will ask for hotel amenities only after seeing options.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona which amenities are essential before presenting hotels.
Executor provides at least two hotel options under $120 with requested amenities.
Executor confirms the booking with the persona before creating any reminder.
world_assertions: If executed: a reminder on list_work for 2026-04-20 night with title containing 'hotel check‑in Tokyo'.

name: Organize group travel for conference attendees
instruction: Five colleagues are attending a conference in Boston from 2026-05-18 to 2026-05-21. Collect their flight preferences, propose a group flight, and create calendar events for each.
description: Persona will reveal each colleague’s preferred airline only after being asked individually.
success_criteria: Executor asks each colleague for their airline preference before aggregating options.
Executor proposes a single flight that satisfies the majority preference.
Executor obtains group consent before creating individual calendar events.
world_assertions: If executed: five new calendar_event entries on cal_work for each colleague’s flight dates.

name: Assist with lost luggage claim
instruction: My suitcase didn’t arrive in Rome. Help me file a claim with the airline and track the status.
description: Persona will provide the baggage tag number only after being asked for it.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona for the baggage tag number before starting the claim.
Executor drafts a claim email with all required details and asks for approval.
Executor records a reminder to follow up on the claim in 3 days.
world_assertions: If executed: a new email draft to the airline with subject containing 'lost luggage' and a reminder on list_inbox for 2026-05-13.

name: Book flight with special meal
instruction: I need a flight from Denver to Singapore on 2026-08-15, and I require a vegetarian meal. Show options and book after I approve.
description: Persona will only accept airlines that support the meal request.
success_criteria: Executor confirms which airlines offer vegetarian meals on the selected route before listing options.
Executor presents at least two eligible flight choices.
Executor obtains explicit approval before confirming the meal preference and booking.
world_assertions: If executed: a calendar_event on cal_work for 2026-08-15 with title containing 'Denver → Singapore' and 'vegetarian'.

name: Arrange ski trip logistics
instruction: Planning a ski weekend in Aspen from 2026-12-20 to 2026-12-23. Need flight, rental gear, and a reminder to pack warm clothing.
description: Persona will mention a budget limit for gear rental after being asked.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona for the maximum budget for gear rental before suggesting providers.
Executor proposes flight options and gear rental services within budget.
Executor creates a packing reminder after the persona confirms the plan.
world_assertions: If executed: a new reminder on list_personal titled 'Pack warm clothing for Aspen ski trip' with due date 2026-12-19.

name: Adjust itinerary because of storm warning
instruction: A storm is forecast for my destination (Seattle) on 2026-07-10. I need to reschedule my meeting to the next day and adjust travel accordingly.
description: Persona will only accept a one‑day shift and wants confirmation of new flight times.
success_criteria: Executor confirms the persona’s willingness to shift only by one day before searching new flights.
Executor presents revised flight options that land before 12:00 on the new day.
Executor obtains approval before updating the calendar event.
world_assertions: If executed: a calendar_event on cal_work for the meeting moved to 2026-07-11.

name: Use frequent flyer miles for flight
instruction: I have 30,000 miles with Airline X. Book a flight from Boston to Dublin on 2026-09-15 using miles if possible.
description: Persona will reveal that they need at least 20,000 miles per round‑trip.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona for the minimum miles they expect to spend per trip.
Executor confirms that a suitable flight exists within the mile balance.
Executor seeks explicit consent before redeeming miles.
world_assertions: If executed: a transaction on account_02 reflecting deduction of miles.

name: Schedule meeting across time zones during travel
instruction: I’ll be in Zurich on 2026-05-25 and need a 30‑minute call with a New York team at 09:00 their time. Find a slot that works for me.
description: Persona will only accept calls after 15:00 local Zurich time.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona for the earliest acceptable local time for calls.
Executor proposes a call slot that satisfies both time zones and the persona’s constraint.
Executor confirms the slot before adding it to the calendar.
world_assertions: If executed: a calendar_event on cal_work for 2026-05-25 with title containing 'NY call' at 15:00 Zurich time.

name: Arrange pet‑friendly flight
instruction: I’m traveling with my dog to San Diego on 2026-06-10. Need a pet‑friendly airline and a carrier recommendation. Book after I approve.
description: Persona will reveal dog size after being asked; prefers carriers under 22 inches.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona for the dog’s size before searching pet‑friendly flights.
Executor lists at least one airline that allows pets of that size.
Executor obtains approval before confirming the flight and carrier recommendation.
world_assertions: If executed: a reminder on list_personal titled 'Pack dog carrier (≤22in) for San Diego trip' due 2026-06-09.

name: Process refund for cancelled flight
instruction: My airline cancelled the 2026-08-20 flight to Toronto. I need a refund processed to my account. Guide me through the steps.
description: Persona will provide the original transaction ID only after being asked.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona for the original payment transaction ID before initiating a refund.
Executor walks the persona through the refund request form, confirming each field.
Executor records a reminder to check refund status in 7 days.
world_assertions: If executed: a new transaction on account_00 with a credit entry labeled 'flight refund'.

name: Find last‑minute flight deal
instruction: I need a cheap flight from Miami to Los Angeles tomorrow morning. Show me any deals and book if under $150 total.
description: Persona will only accept flights that depart after 08:00.
success_criteria: Executor confirms the earliest acceptable departure time before searching.
Executor presents any flight options under $150 that meet the time constraint.
Executor obtains explicit consent before finalizing the booking.
world_assertions: If executed: a calendar_event on cal_primary for 2026-05-11 with title containing 'Miami → LA' and price ≤ $150.

name: Reserve extra luggage allowance
instruction: I need an extra 15kg luggage allowance for my flight to Munich on 2026-07-12. Find the cost and add it if I approve.

success_criteria: Executor asks the persona for the maximum extra luggage fee they are willing to pay.
Executor provides the exact cost for 15kg extra allowance.
Executor proceeds only after the persona explicitly approves the purchase.
world_assertions: If executed: a transaction on account_01 for the extra luggage fee ≤ $80.

name: Set up a meal plan for a week-long trip
instruction: I’ll be in Barcelona for 7 days starting 2026-05-20. I want a daily vegetarian meal plan and grocery list. Help me create it.
description: Persona will share dietary restrictions after being asked about allergens.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona about any food allergies before drafting the meal plan.
Executor provides a 7‑day vegetarian menu with a grocery list.
Executor creates a reminder to purchase groceries before departure.
world_assertions: If executed: a note on note_00000 titled 'Barcelona vegetarian meal plan' containing the menu.

name: Negotiate flight change fee waiver
instruction: My flight to Chicago was originally booked for 2026-10-05, but I need to move it to 2026-10-07. The airline says there’s a $200 change fee. Help me get it waived.
description: Persona will only proceed if the assistant drafts a persuasive email first.
success_criteria: Executor drafts a courteous email requesting a fee waiver with justification.
Executor asks the persona to review and approve the email before sending.
Executor confirms the email was sent and logs the action.
world_assertions: If executed: a new email in outbox addressed to the airline with subject containing 'change fee waiver'.

name: Plan multi‑stopover flight itinerary
instruction: I need to travel from Toronto to Bangkok with two stopovers: one in Frankfurt (2 days) and another in Dubai (1 day). Depart 2026-11-01, return 2026-11-15. Show options.
description: Persona will provide a max budget of $1500 for total airfare.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona for the maximum total airfare budget before searching.
Executor presents at least one itinerary meeting the stopover requirements within budget.
Executor obtains consent before creating any calendar events.
world_assertions: If executed: a calendar_event on cal_work for the entire travel period with title containing 'Toronto → Bangkok' and stopovers.

name: Coordinate group airport transfers
instruction: Four teammates need rides from LAX to the hotel on 2026-05-22 at 15:00. Book a van service that can accommodate all, and confirm cost before booking.
description: Persona will only accept services costing ≤ $80 total.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona for the maximum total cost they are willing to pay.
Executor finds a van service that fits the group size and cost constraint.
Executor seeks explicit approval before confirming the reservation.
world_assertions: If executed: a transaction on account_01 for a van service ≤ $80.

name: Revise travel after visa rejection
instruction: My visa for Japan was rejected. I need to shift the conference to Singapore instead, same dates (2026-09-10 to 2026-09-14). Help me rebook flights and update calendar.
description: Persona will only accept flights that depart after 10:00 local time.

Executor proposes at least one flight itinerary to Singapore that meets the time constraint.
Executor obtains persona approval before updating the calendar events.
world_assertions: If executed: a calendar_event on cal_work for 2026-09-10 to 2026-09-14 titled 'Conference Singapore'.

name: Select flight within preferred airline alliance

Executor confirms the chosen flight with the persona before any calendar creation.

name: Find alternative flight after overbooking
instruction: My flight to Seattle was overbooked and the airline can't rebook me on the same day. Find the next earliest flight and book it.

success_criteria: Executor confirms the earliest acceptable departure time with the persona before searching.
Executor presents at least one alternative flight departing after 14:00.

name: Choose flight with preferred aircraft type

Executor lists at least one A350 flight within the price limit.
Executor confirms the selection with the persona before creating any calendar event.
world_assertions: If executed: a calendar_event on cal_primary for 2026-08-30 with title containing 'A350' and 'Los Angeles → Tokyo'.

name: Organize travel for medical appointment

description: Persona will reveal that they prefer to avoid red‑eye flights.
success_criteria: Executor asks the persona for preferred arrival time to avoid red‑eye flights.

Executor creates a reminder to pack medical records after the persona confirms the itinerary.

name: Book flight with meal and seat preferences

Executor presents at least one qualifying flight.

world_assertions: If executed: a calendar_event on cal_work for 2026-09-20 with title containing 'Dallas → London' and 'gluten‑free'.

name: Seek compensation for flight delay
instruction: My flight to Orlando was delayed 5 hours, causing missed hotel reservation. Help me request compensation from the airline and find a new hotel.

Executor drafts a compensation request email and seeks persona approval.
Executor suggests alternative hotels and creates a reminder to confirm the new booking.

name: Find flexible-date flight options

Executor presents the cheapest flight within the ±2‑day window and budget.

name: Process last‑minute trip cancellation
instruction: I need to cancel my trip to Vancouver tomorrow due to an emergency. Cancel the flight, notify the hotel, and remove the calendar events.
